AC: 4
WIS: +5
Focus: Affliction Efficiency II
WT: 2.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: WRIST
AC: 4
WIS: +5
Focus: Affliction Efficiency II
WT: 2.0 Size: SMALL

Race: ALL

Post Comment
Finally...
QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2026 at 4:43 PM Rating: Decent
v2Stulovar
5 posts
After over 120 kills (a lot of revisits) of The Great Oowomp in TD (faster spawn than WK, anyway) a bracelet dropped.
I was worried since it is not on the list of loot dropped in TD here. Like others spent a lot of time wondering, but people in the bazaar have it, so it must drop somewhere...right?
So yes, it does still exist. For me at least, it is very rare, but for now at least I have a happy shaman.

killed the great oowampa 89 times in timourous deep,

every single item listed dropped between 4 and 18 times EXCEPT the bracelet which was rthe only thing i wanted.

i was told in geneal chat that this item is no longer dropping, can anyone confirm whether item is gone from game or was it i was cheated out of it by the bugged up drop rate??

QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2004 at 5:31 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592760803480

Does this look like chain or cloth?

oh if this one looks like cloth is it the polished bone bracelet that looks like chain?
▲ Page top
effic. stacking
QuoteReply
# May 31 2004 at 1:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966636872
View User Forum
21 posts
Does Affliction Efficiency II and Mana Efficiency II stack?
▲ Page top
RE: effic. stacking
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2004 at 2:16 AM Rating: Default
Ardnahoy
Scholar
340 posts
Mana Eefficiency affects almost all spells for ~20% efficiency. Affliction Efficiency only affects DoT's, but it increases their efficiency by ~25%.

The item with the best focus effect for a particular spell will be the one used. You will get an emote in the main chat window telling you which item was chosen.
____________________________
Duke Ardnahoy
Noble Lord Protector of the 70th Crusade
Fennin Ro - EQ I

Ardnahoy II
Fearless Guardian of the 40th Tour
Mistmore - EQ II
▲ Page top
RE: effic. stacking
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2004 at 1:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591811630399
14 posts
Mana preservation (what you were refering to) is actually 10%. This is much more effective, and can seriously aid in more casting before its med-time.
▲ Page top
Go to Timorous Deep
QuoteReply
# Jan 04 2004 at 10:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362859807
6 posts
I spent well over four hours today killing Goonda; I probably killed him and the shamans and priestesses 25+ times. I got a couple of nice drops including the batfang headband, but no chipped bone bracelet. I had read some post indicating that perhaps only the Great Oowamp dropped this item now, so I headed over to Timorous Deep. The Great Oowomp dropped the bracelet on the first pull.

I'm a 46 druid, snare -> drifting death -> drones -> Immolate -> Calefaction. He heals himself and casts a lot of spells so load up on your resists. I had no problem with Goonda or the Great Ooowomp.
▲ Page top

Chief Goonda was good to me, dropped the CBB on the second spawn. (I only stayed for 2). The next time I camped him, 3 spawns, I got Batskull Earrings and Sheer Bone Mask.

# Jul 06 2003 at 12:20 AM Rating: Decent

Got Chipped Bone Bracelet and Turtle Shell Helm by just running through this camp, well, first killed Goonda(dropped nothing), and while i looked him up on this site... two shamans spawned, killed em both and got one helm and a bracelet from the other =)

# Mar 02 2003 at 3:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362223713
8 posts
No worth the camp, camped here for 16 hours waiting for the Chipped Bone Bracelet to drop from priestess - never did. Would have been far easier just to go to the bazaar - the time wasted camping these mods could have been used to get the pp's required (current cost 400pp approx).

# Apr 12 2003 at 7:13 AM Rating: Decent

Bought one of these for 50pp today in the Bazaar.

▲ Page top
Very random
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2002 at 5:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253449414
23 posts
The first time I ever hunted the Goonda camp, two Chipped Bone Bracelets dropped in the first camp spawn, one bracelet off of Goonda, one off of an Ogre Priestess. Since the drops came so quickly, I assumed they were fairly common. I was so wrong.

Since then, I have been back to that camp over a couple dozen times with my mains and alts, but have only picked up one other bracelet...off of an Ogre Shaman. The other loot in this camp is also random and rare. It seems to drop off any one of the ogres in the camp, at any time. Just keep killing them. Eventually, whatever you're looking for will drop.

Good luck!
▲ Page top
RE: Very random
QuoteReply
# Jan 06 2003 at 12:48 PM Rating: Default
Tassoth
574 posts
i got one of these for my BL the other day of Oowomp, i found that if you sit on the beach pulling the spiroc's you can get great exp of those and while you wait for those to re-pop go and pull him, since exp is good here untill 50's at least you don't lose out and there is always the hope that he will drop something!!

and it was hear that i first realised beast can both kite and reverse kite as well, not as effective as other casters but good non the less, got me 2 lvl's pretty quick and i first came here at 43 with kei obviously.
____________________________
The Real Iksar

Madho
Novocane
Poldarn
▲ Page top
Stackable?
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2002 at 6:08 AM Rating: Decent
Ecticar
View User Forum
Scholar
17 posts
If two of these are equpped does the % of reduction stack? I haven't been watching closely enough to tell.
▲ Page top
RE: Stackable?
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2002 at 3:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246402577
118 posts
no only one focus item of each type IE Affliction Efficiency use thier effect and the highest value (I,II, or III) will show up therefore this would override an item with AE I...
regardless -25% mana is huge for anyone planning on dot kiting, shaman, druid, necro(an int would prob be better though)
▲ Page top
RE: Stackable?
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2002 at 3:13 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592756913916
200 posts
Actually, with the 25% mana you are saving with this, you about break even on the higher Int items and you actually are better off if you only have a +1 to +4 item here. Take a look at the Int/Mana ratios. With just one spell that costs 150 or more, you save 35 mana. If I just cast Chilling Embrace and Dooming Darkness, I can save 80 mana. I can cast both those spells about 6 times each before I am OoM. With this, I would have saved over 450 mana on just those two spells. Do the math.... This thing is worth more than any Int bracer to a DoT caster.
▲ Page top
RE: Stackable?
QuoteReply
# Nov 15 2002 at 2:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779080153
34 posts
if this were an int item of course
▲ Page top
RE: Stackable?
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2003 at 11:47 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591776013048
View User Forum
263 posts
He or she is not saying that this is an Int item. The mana saved by this item can be greater than the mana you would have gained from having an item with a few Int on it, that's all.

I spent 10 hours killing Chief Goonda and his clan and never got one of these. So, I tried the great Oowamp for 7 hours and still don't have one. I'm thinking of just camping HGs for an hour and buying one. At least thats a sure thing.
▲ Page top
what does it do?
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2002 at 11:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774725418
24 posts
what does the effect actually do? the site's explanation is kinda hard to understand
▲ Page top
RE: what does it do?
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2002 at 4:06 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591778129393
Scholar
59 posts
Costs less mana for DOT and debuff spells that last over 36 seconds, for spell levels 44 and below.

▲ Page top
RE: what does it do?
QuoteReply

got lucky
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2002 at 3:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769775006
22 posts
I was in wk killing a mad croon when i got to close to camp and the chief and a guard came out after me. i rooted them both and killed croon. let puppy kill guard while I kept chief rooted. then i slowed the chief and let my puppy eat him. anyway to get to my point, i stayed there for 2 hours and got 2 bone chipped braclets and 4 bat wing earrings.whent back the next day and stayed for 4 hours with no luck at all.

46 posts
if clearing camp is not a trigger for priestess i suggest not killing the guards so they will use up their harmtouch for the day
▲ Page top
p.s. to wk campin
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2001 at 10:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758324939
Scholar
46 posts
it is easy to outrun aggro range on snared ogres in wk. i use the fury of air spell after the dd that gets Goonda to less than half health. That's usually when he heals himself
Froon and choon will help you with guards if you are in wolfform. They aggroed me in human form.
I am also curious whether clearing the camp completely is a trigger for a priestess spawn.
▲ Page top
wk campin
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2001 at 9:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758324939
Scholar
46 posts
seems to be an ultra rare drop here in wk. been here 3 days in a row and have gotten everything but it.
i have no problems with adds in wk as 40 druid in wolf form. I can pick and chose from full ogre camp by runnin and snaring all but what i plan to kill. then when my victim is separated, just snare and dd
Goonda loves to heal himself so i usually fury of air him on about the third dd cast to stun him and interrupt his heal. otherwise i firestrike.
▲ Page top
RE: wk campin
QuoteReply
# Apr 04 2002 at 2:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770561065
119 posts
I had a blast camping the area with my 40 pal. A little creative rooting and self-healing makes splitting it up quite easy. And I have more than enough time to heal and med in between once that is done.
